violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee came into deli prep area from stocking, put on gloves to slice deli meat. *Redirectd immediately, glove use does NOT replace the need for hand wash.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani buckets found with greater than 100ppm Chlorine solutions.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Thermometer Calibration log last completed June 2025.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Facility does not have chlorine test strips to test meat dpartmetn chlorine sanitizer buckets.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Shelves next to meat walk in cooler have peeling/worn liners. -Some gapping at the corner edge of the bottom shelf of the meat cutting table.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Calibration log for Deli HACCP plan last completed June 2025 (only documented calibration for 2025).
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at exteriors of some of the spice containers.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Corner wall between hand sink and 3 comp sink is stained and worn.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Lunch cooler and employee beverages stored commingling with food items in meat walk in cooler.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
